# krd-files

## Purpose

Placeholder directory containing only a README. The actual `.krd` binary fixture files live at the monorepo root in `test-fixtures/krd/` and are loaded by `loadKrdFixture(filename)` from `@kaiord/core/test-utils`. This folder exists historically; do not add new fixtures here.

## Key Files

| File        | Description                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| ----------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `README.md` | Explains the indirection: fixtures live at `<monorepo-root>/test-fixtures/krd/`, are regenerated by `pnpm generate:krd-fixtures` from FIT files, and are consumed via `loadKrdFixture(name)`. |

## For AI Agents

### Working In This Directory

- DO NOT place `.krd` files in this directory. New fixtures go in `<monorepo-root>/test-fixtures/krd/`. If you need a NEW one, add the source FIT file to `<monorepo-root>/test-fixtures/fit/` and run `pnpm generate:krd-fixtures` (script in `scripts/generate-krd-fixtures.ts`).
- The `FIXTURE_NAMES` constant in `src/test-utils/fixtures.ts` is the canonical list (INDIVIDUAL_STEPS, REPEAT_STEPS, CUSTOM_TARGET_VALUES, REPEAT_GREATER_THAN). Add new fixtures there too.
